scenarios.description: charset(Charset.US_ASCII) in HTML mode updates existing <meta charset> and removes mixed obsolete <meta name=charset>
scenarios.precondition: Document.createShell with one meta[charset] and two meta[name=charset] under head
scenarios.expectedResult: existing meta[charset] updated to US_ASCII, all meta[name=charset] removed
pseudocode: TEST TC07 html mixed existing charset and obsolete

scenarios.description: charset(Charset.UTF_16LE) in XML mode prepends new XmlDeclaration when first child is XmlDeclaration with non-xml name
scenarios.path: B0→B1(xml)→B4(node instanceof XmlDeclaration && name!="xml")→B5(prepend new decl)
scenarios.precondition: Document.createShell, updateMetaCharset true, syntax xml, and prepend child XmlDeclaration named 'foo'
scenarios.expectedResult: a new XmlDeclaration named 'xml' with version=1.0 and encoding=UTF_16LE is prepended before the existing 'foo' declaration
pseudocode: TEST TC08 xml existing non-xml declaration
